bio: Percy was dumped alongside Penny and Pepper in October 2025, but unlike them, he chose a different path. He’s made the park his home, happily roaming between the Clusters and living life on his own  terms. A social and curious boy, Percy loves people and will often follow the feeders around on their rounds, always hoping for a little attention (and maybe an extra snack too!)
location: In the park by the Outside Gym by Nola, Cluster P.
